song.title: Rescue the Perishing
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Rescue the perishing, Care for the dying, Snatch them in pity from Sin and the grave;|| Weep o’er the erring one, Lift up the fallen, Tell them of Jesus The mighty to save.
[C] Chorus Rescue the perishing, Care for the dying; Jesus is merciful, Jesus will save.
[V2] 2) Though they are slighting Him, Still He is waiting, Waiting the penitent Child to receive;|| Plead with them earnestly, Plead with them gently; He will forgive If they only believe.
[V3] 3) Down in the human heart, Crushed by the tempter, Feelings lie buried That grace can restore;|| Touched by a loving heart, Wakened by kindness, Chords that are broken Will vibrate once more.
[V4] 4) Rescue the perishing, Duty demands it; Strength for thy labor The Lord will provide;|| Back to the narrow way Patiently win them; Tell the poor wand’rer A Savior has died.
song.author: Fanny J. Crosby
